Container.Name: RustKan
Container.Overview:
RustKan is a clean, secure, and lightning-fast Kanban board application built in Rust with Yew and Axum.
Key Features: - High performance and tiny resource footprint. - Dynamic color themes (Light, Dark, Nord, Dracula, Sepia). - Multilingual interface support. - Optional access PIN encryption for privacy.
Container.Requires: If you lock the application with a PIN, it is recommended to set a strong PIN and back up your data directory.

Config.Name: App Data
Config.Description: Persistent storage for your Kanban boards.

Config.Name: Access PIN
Config.Description: Optional numerical PIN to lock access to the rustkan interface (leave empty for public mode).

Config.Name: Site Title
Config.Description: Custom website title rendered in the navigation header or browser tab.

Config.Name: Base URL
Config.Description: Application base URL. Highly recommended to set if using a reverse proxy to ensure redirect and socket links are generated correctly.

Config.Name: Allowed Origins
Config.Description: Comma-separated list of allowed HTTP request origins (CORS filter). Use '*' to allow all origins.
